mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Salina Ellen Bowman, (now Hylton) until 02.22.1895 when she reached 21 years of age
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Salina Ellen Bowman, (now Hylton) until 02.22.1895 when she reached 21 years of age Daniel B. Bowman, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book 4, Page 332-333, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
